title: ochna angustata
intro: Ochna angustata, also known as the small-fruited bushwillow or mistletoe bush, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, Ochna angustata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to make herbal remedies for various health conditions.
